# Support

This repository is an early-stage build scaffold.

## Best place to start
- Use **GitHub Discussions** for open-ended design questions.
- Use **Issues** for actionable bugs, slices of implementation work, or documentation gaps.
- Use **Pull Requests** for concrete changes.

## What to include
- what you were trying to do
- what part of the repo you touched
- expected outcome
- actual outcome
- logs, screenshots, or routine / asset IDs when relevant

## Safety-sensitive concerns
If the issue could affect robot motion, people proximity, accessory power, or public-demo operation, open a safety-tagged issue and treat it as high priority.
